description: Letter in the hand of Nahray b. Nissim. In Judaeo-Arabic The writer had paid 60+ dinars to gentiles to save Yeshuʿa al-Fāsī. He had asked the latter three years back to deliver the money to the Ra's al-Mathība in Jerusalem. Instead Yeshuʿa claimed that Nahray owed him money. Information from Goitein's note card. (NB: This was previously described as "Business letter by David b. Abi Zimra," which must belong to another unidentified shelfmark.)
description_he: מכתב בכתב יד נהריי בן נסים. הכותב שילם 60+ דינרים לגויים להציל את ישועה אל-פאסי, שטוען כי נהריי חייב לו כסף.
